default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Provide an update on the hiring pipeline for content writers and discuss next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [12 candidate assessments have been received so far, with positive feedback](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Molly is framing the assessment as an insight into the work rather than a test](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Demetrios will filter candidates first, then pass top ones to Marcel for final review](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Discussed scoring framework to evaluate candidates objectively](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Goal is to onboard the first batch of hires by end of this week](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Assessment Update

  - [12 assessments received so far, mostly positive feedback](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Framing assessment as work sample rather than test](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Most candidates have also completed video questionnaire](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

### Reviewing Candidate: Monique Thune

  - [Reviewed Monique's assessment and background](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Good ideation process and use of tools, but intro writing could be stronger](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Has relevant experience writing for various sites](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Overall checks most boxes, pending further review of sites worked on](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

### Evaluation Process

  - [Need objective scoring framework across multiple factors to reduce bias](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Demetrios will do initial filter, score candidates 1-5, and pass top ones to Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Marcel will have final review, aiming for 15 min video calls](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Scoring will help identify high-potential candidates beyond just experience](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

### Onboarding Timeline

  - [Goal to have first batch of hires onboarded by end of this week](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Align on start dates, training materials, compensation expectations](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [August is packed for Marcel, so getting ahead on onboarding is crucial](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Molly to look into adding culture/work style questions to assessment](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Demetrios to filter and score candidates, send top ones to Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [Marcel to review top candidates, schedule 15 min calls with Alice's help](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Align on onboarding plan - start dates, training, compensation](https://fathom.video/share/BdH2hPCdHdXvxsFcpr59Ps9p8pxk_MzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)

action_items.description: Look into Workable functionality for assessing candidates' work styles
Look into adding culture ad question to new assessment questions
Develop a 1 to 5 scoring framework for candidates
Have first batch of candidates ready to onboard by end of this week with a start date of August 19th
Continue pushing newsletters to promote webinar this Friday
